name: Lions CricTracker
description: Cricket coaching and player progress tracker for Lions Cricket Academy. Log daily batting and bowling drills across every zone, follow a structured shot-by-shot technique guide with step-by-step key points, track XP and level progression, and stay connected with coaches and teammates through direct messages and team group chat.

shortcuts.name: Cricket Guide
shortcuts.description: Jump straight to the shot-by-shot technique guide

shortcuts.name: Messages
shortcuts.description: Open DMs and team group chat
